closures.title: Closures
closures.dialogDescription: Closure days are location-specific and can be drafted before publishing.
closures.publishDescription: Parents will be notified immediately if notifications are enabled.
closures.publishAttendanceDescription: Children are already checked in for this date. Publishing will mark them closed and keep an audit record.
closures.removeDescription: This draft has not been sent to parents.
closures.cancelDescription: Parents who were notified will receive a cancellation message.
closures.emptyState: No closure days for this location and year yet.
closures.loadError: Couldn't load closure days. Please try again.
closures.genericError: Couldn't save this closure. Please try again.
closures.duplicateDate: This location already has a closure on that date.
closures.pastDate: Closure days can only be created for today or a future date.
closures.attendanceConfirmationRequired: Some children are already checked in for this date.
closures.publishSummary: {messages} parent messages created, {failed} push notifications failed.
closures.cancelSummary: {messages} cancellation messages created, {released} attendance records released.
